meaning: adj.无糖的,不含糖的(尤指用糖精配制的)
examples: Sugarless yogurt could help beat bad breath, tooth decay and gum disease.
Sugarless yoghurt could help beat bad breath, tooth decay and gum disease, say scientists.
Drinking lots of water or chewing sugarless gum can also help.
Usually served with cola, its taste can be closely compared to a sugarless Jagermeister.
The magic ingredient in modern sugarless gums is Xylitol, a sweetener made by a Danish firm from silver-birch pulp.
